headline: Govee's rechargeable smart table lamp is down to $60
summary: Govee's color-changing smart lamp is now $59.99 ($20 off) at Amazon. This marks its best price yet, ideal for parties or mood lighting. The rechargeable lamp offers up to 30 hours of battery life.

headline: SpaceX's massive IPO: all the latest news
summary: SpaceX's IPO allows public investment in the combined rocket, AI, and social media company. The offering is expected to make Elon Musk the first trillionaire. Musk's projected wealth could surpass the economies of some nations.

headline: Jeff Bezos' AI startup aims to build an 'artificial general engineer'
summary: Jeff Bezos' new AI startup, Prometheus, targets an 'artificial general engineer.' The company plans to develop AI tools for designing physical products. This initiative was previously reported, with new details emerging.

headline: SpaceX is now public
summary: SpaceX officially went public on June 12th, trading on Nasdaq. Shares started at $135, though retail investors may pay more. This IPO is one of the most anticipated and controversial public offerings ever.

headline: Live-Service Crumbling, Halo: Combat Evolved Shines as Only 'Forever Game' This Summer
summary: Many live-service games are struggling, including giants like Fortnite. Summer showcases highlighted a shift towards legacy franchises. Halo: Combat Evolved emerged as the sole 'forever game' on display.

headline: New Woot Customers Can Score a Nintendo Switch 2 Console for $434
summary: Woot offers a Nintendo Switch 2 console for $434 to new customers. This special price requires a unique code at checkout. The limited-time deal expires on June 19th.

headline: Bad Magpie: A Creative and Chaotic Puzzle Adventure Preview
summary: IGN had 16 minutes of hands-on time with the game Bad Magpie. The preview highlighted chaotic gameplay, including sonic bird calls and puzzles. Bad Magpie is described as instantly charming with great puzzles.

headline: What Is Disclosure Day Actually About?
summary: This article takes a deep dive into the concept of 'Disclosure Day.' It explores the secrets behind Steven Spielberg's new sci-fi opus. The piece aims to unravel the core themes of the film.

headline: Defence row exposes tensions over how to keep UK safe
summary: A defence row highlights disagreements over UK safety strategies. Former Defence Secretary John Healey calls the investment plan insufficient. Tensions are rising regarding the required level of defence spending.

headline: Celebrated British artist David Hockney dies aged 88
summary: Renowned British artist David Hockney has passed away at 88. Hockney was one of the UK's most important and influential artists. He leaves behind a significant legacy in the art world.

headline: Ministers want 60% of children walking or cycling to school by 2035
summary: UK ministers aim for 60% of children to walk or cycle to school by 2035. Thousands of new safer paths and crossings are promised. The initiative seeks to promote activity in England's towns and cities.

headline: Grooming survivors with criminal records still being failed, BBC told
summary: A report author states grooming victims prosecuted as children are still failed. Many survivors are left with criminal records due to their abuse. The BBC was informed of ongoing systemic failures for these individuals.
